About Tory
A dedicated advisor, not a call center.
"I'm here to be your trusted resource for any precious metals need — whether you're just starting out or managing a multi-generational portfolio."
Tory Aggeler is a Senior Precious Metals Advisor with McAlvany Precious Metals, specializing in physical delivery, domestic and foreign storage, and precious metals IRA placement. With deep expertise in estate liquidations, trust accounts, and total portfolio strategy, Tory offers something increasingly rare in the industry: a single, dedicated advisor who knows your name and your goals.

This is an unregulated industry. Choosing the right advisor matters enormously. Tory is always available for one-on-one phone calls or video conferences — and every consultation is completely free.
Ethical
No high-pressure tactics. Honest assessments, always.
Transparent
Clear pricing and full disclosure on every product.
Strategic
Every portfolio approached individually.
Accessible
Available by phone or video — not through a queue.
866.211.8972
taggeler@mcalvany.com
Why Now
Gold near all-time highs.
The case for ownership
has never been stronger.
Gold surpassed $3,100/oz in March 2026 — driven by dollar uncertainty, energy market disruption, and accelerating central bank buying. Silver remains historically undervalued relative to gold.

Investors who waited for the "right time" to buy metals are now paying a significant premium. Those who acted early — with a clear strategy — are sitting on meaningful gains and real protection.

Tory's clients don't time the market. They build positions with purpose.

Services
Three ways to own precious metals
Whether you want metals in hand, securely vaulted, or inside a tax-advantaged account — Tory handles every step, personally.
01
Physical Delivery
Coins, bars, and rounds shipped securely to your door. Tory advises on the right products, quantities, and timing — then handles fulfillment from order to arrival.
Talk to Tory →
02
Domestic & Foreign Storage
Fully allocated, segregated vault storage — domestic or international. Backed by Vaulted, with regular valuations, complete account visibility, and easy liquidation.
Talk to Tory →
03
Precious Metals IRA
Place IRS-approved gold and silver inside a self-directed IRA. Tory walks you through setup, funding, and ongoing management — compliantly, strategically, and clearly.
Talk to Tory →
The Team
Real people, real relationships.
When you work with Tory, you get a full team. Every member is here to support your experience from first call to long-term management.
Senior Precious Metals Advisor
Tory Aggeler
Tory manages and advises on physical precious metals portfolios — delivery, storage, and IRA placement. He specializes in estate liquidations, trust accounts, and long-term portfolio strategy. Always available for a direct conversation.
Portfolio Strategy IRA Placement Estate Liquidation
Client Services Manager
Deanna Kuchler
Deanna is your first point of contact. She manages storage accounts, coordinates shipments, provides trade records, and delivers regular portfolio valuations. She answers your calls and makes everything run smoothly.
Storage Accounts Shipment Tracking Valuations
IRA Specialist & Advisor
Eric Ochocki
Eric is our IRA specialist, assistant precious metals advisor, and outside broker relationship manager. He educates clients on terms, product options, and pitfalls to avoid — a vital resource for anyone navigating the IRA space.
IRA Specialist Broker Relations Client Education
